members.label: wall feature
members.long_form_open_description: Continuous white baseboard trim running along the bottom of the walls and stairs; visible at the foot of the stairs and along the left wall, providing contrast to the beige wall color.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: runs along the base of the stairs and left wall, below the light switch and wall sign
members.object_text_long: left sector | Continuous white baseboard trim running along the bottom of the walls and stairs; visible at the foot of the stairs and along the left wall, providing contrast to the beige wall color.
